Slide 8 — The People Speak
Beyond The Numbers
Music So Powerful, They Paid Anyway.
Teddy Afro released Etorika completely free on YouTube — no paywall, no label, no streaming fees. Yet fans from across the world began voluntarily donating, moved by what the music meant to them.
$99.99
"ሃገሬ እትዮጵያ ቀን ይወጣላታል!"
$100.00
"Ethiopia Tikdem!"

"This album transcends words… music that heals, inspires"
